setupGlobals(core, github, context, exec, io);

await main();

2026-04-04T19:49:25.1110489Z   debug: false
2026-04-04T19:49:25.1110937Z   user-agent: actions/github-script
2026-04-04T19:49:25.1111463Z   result-encoding: json
2026-04-04T19:49:25.1111926Z   retries: 0
2026-04-04T19:49:25.1122897Z   retry-exempt-status-codes: 400,401,403,404,422
2026-04-04T19:49:25.1123451Z env:
2026-04-04T19:49:25.1128948Z   GH_AW_MODEL_MULTIPLIERS: {
  "version": "1",
  "description": "Effective Tokens (ET) computation data per the gh-aw Effective Tokens Specification v0.2.0. Token class weights are applied first to normalize across token classes, then the per-model multiplier scales the result relative to the reference model.",
  "reference_model": "claude-sonnet-4.5",
  "token_class_weights": {
